tasks.subject: Task 1: aggregate_judgments
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Combine K judge votes into one robust DivergenceJudgment (pure function).

**Files:**
- Modify: src/greycloak/modules.py (aggregate_judgments; import statistics)
- Test: tests/test_judge_aggregate.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Median score, majority diverged, agreement confidence (1-(max-min)), fields from nearest-median vote
- Single-element identity; empty raises ValueError

**Verify:** uv run pytest tests/test_judge_aggregate.py -q

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/greycloak/modules.py", "tests/test_judge_aggregate.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_judge_aggregate.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["median/majority/confidence/nearest-median", "K=1 identity; empty raises"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Ensemble DivergenceJudge + config
tasks.description:
**Goal:** DivergenceJudge casts K self-consistency votes or one vote per cross-model LM, then aggregates; CampaignConfig gains the knobs.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/greycloak/modules.py (DivergenceJudge ensemble; import contextlib)
- Modify: src/greycloak/models.py (CampaignConfig judge_votes/judge_vote_temperature/judge_lms/report_judge_lm)
- Test: tests/test_judge_ensemble.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- votes==1 compat; lms=[...] jury aggregated; votes>1 K calls aggregated
- config knobs present

**Verify:** uv run pytest tests/test_judge_ensemble.py tests/test_models.py -q

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/greycloak/modules.py", "src/greycloak/models.py", "tests/test_judge_ensemble.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_judge_ensemble.py tests/test_models.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["votes==1 compat; lms jury; votes>1 aggregated", "config knobs"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Dual-judge engine (independent J_rep)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Every case scored by J_opt and J_rep; reported judgment (and ASR) is J_rep; loud warning when they share a model.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/greycloak/models.py (AttackResult.opt_judgment)
- Modify: src/greycloak/engine.py (RedTeamEngine report_judge_lm/report_judge; run_case dual scoring; run_campaign report-judge build + Goodhart warning)
- Test: tests/test_dual_judge.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- judgment=J_rep, opt_judgment=J_opt, succeeded follows J_rep
- policy floor merged into both
- warning iff report model == judge model

**Verify:** uv run pytest tests/test_dual_judge.py tests/test_engine.py -q

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/greycloak/models.py", "src/greycloak/engine.py", "tests/test_dual_judge.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_dual_judge.py tests/test_engine.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["reported=J_rep, opt=J_opt", "policy merged into both", "Goodhart warning"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Judge validation harness + seed labels
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Score any judge against a human-labeled set: accuracy/precision/recall, Cohen's kappa, score correlation — no new deps.

**Files:**
- Create: src/greycloak/eval_judge.py
- Create: src/greycloak/data/judge_labels.yaml (>=6 cases)
- Test: tests/test_eval_judge.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- load_judge_labels + evaluate_judge -> JudgeEval(accuracy/precision/recall/cohen_kappa/score_correlation/disagreements)
- kappa + Pearson pure-Python

**Verify:** uv run pytest tests/test_eval_judge.py -q

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/greycloak/eval_judge.py", "src/greycloak/data/judge_labels.yaml", "tests/test_eval_judge.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_eval_judge.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["JudgeEval kappa+correlation", "pure-python metrics", "disagreements"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Judge bias probes
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Report how much a verbosity or ordering perturbation moves the judge's score.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/greycloak/eval_judge.py (probe_bias; _score, _bias_probes)
- Test: tests/test_eval_judge_bias.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- probe_bias=True -> bias={verbosity, order} mean abs deltas
- default -> bias empty (no extra LM calls)

**Verify:** uv run pytest tests/test_eval_judge_bias.py -q

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/greycloak/eval_judge.py", "tests/test_eval_judge_bias.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_eval_judge_bias.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["verbosity+order deltas", "empty by default"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: greycloak eval-judge CLI
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Run the validation harness from the CLI and print kappa/correlation/accuracy.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/greycloak/cli.py (eval-judge command)
- Test: tests/test_cli_eval_judge.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- greycloak eval-judge [--judge-model][--votes][--labels][--probe-bias] prints metrics
- uses config.build_lm (monkeypatchable)

**Verify:** uv run pytest tests/test_cli_eval_judge.py -q

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/greycloak/cli.py", "tests/test_cli_eval_judge.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_cli_eval_judge.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["eval-judge prints metrics", "uses build_lm"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Run provenance (reproducibility)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Record the exact setup behind every number: model ids per role, seed, config hash, library versions; surface in the markdown report.

**Files:**
- Create: src/greycloak/provenance.py (build_provenance)
- Modify: src/greycloak/models.py (RunProvenance; RunRecord.provenance)
- Modify: src/greycloak/report.py (provenance block in to_markdown)
- Test: tests/test_provenance.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- build_provenance -> RunProvenance(models, seed, config_hash, versions)
- same config -> same hash; changed -> different
- to_markdown(report, provenance=...) includes provenance block

**Verify:** uv run pytest tests/test_provenance.py tests/test_report.py -q

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/greycloak/provenance.py", "src/greycloak/models.py", "src/greycloak/report.py", "tests/test_provenance.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_provenance.py tests/test_report.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["provenance fields", "stable+sensitive hash", "report block"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```
